title: IEC CIM Asset
description: JSON Schema for an IEC CIM (Common Information Model) network asset as defined in IEC 61968/61970. Represents a physical piece of electrical equipment in a distribution or transmission network.

mRID.description: Master Resource Identifier — globally unique UUID as defined by IEC 61970-301

name.description: The name is any free human readable and possibly non-unique text naming the object.

aliasName.description: The aliasName is free text human readable name of the object alternative to IdentifiedObject.name.

description.description: The description is a free human readable text describing or naming the object.

assetType.description: CIM class name of the asset type

inService.description: Whether the asset is currently in service

baseVoltage.description: Nominal base voltage in kV for the asset's voltage level

criticalityConfig.description: Criticality rating for asset management prioritization

Location.description: CIM Location – geographic location of the asset

addressGeneral.description: Free text address or location description

PositionPoint.description: CIM PositionPoint – a single geographic coordinate pair

sequenceNumber.description: Zero-based sequence number of this point in an ordered set

xPosition.description: X axis position (typically longitude in WGS84)

yPosition.description: Y axis position (typically latitude in WGS84)
